title: The Black Death

gpu: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2070 with Max-Q Design
notes: Launcher doesn't work, but game does. When fullscreened the bottom of the screen was cropped. I was not able to get into the settings menu to change graphics from the main menu, but once in game I was. After changing it to windowed mode, the game worked as intended. Unclear if these issues were because of Proton or the game's Early Access state.
title: The Black Death

notes: worked right out of the box, and started on main display. settings menu only accessible after actually logging into your character. sound effects felt a tad bit off at times, like walking noise.
title: The Black Death
